notes: Live collection detail capture now covers top-level `collection(id:)` plus the merchant-relevant nested `products` connection slice used by the overlay serializer.
Live safe-write capture now covers collectionAddProducts plus immediate downstream `collection.products` / `product.collections` membership parity.
Live safe-write capture now covers collectionCreate plus immediate downstream `collection` / `collections` read parity.
Live safe-write capture now covers collectionDelete plus immediate downstream `collection` / `collections` removal parity.
Live safe-write capture now covers collectionRemoveProducts plus immediate downstream `collection.products` / `product.collections` membership parity.
Live safe-write capture now covers collectionUpdate plus immediate downstream `collection` / nested `product.collections` parity.
Live collections catalog capture now covers top-level `collections` pagination together with a nested merchant-facing `products` slice.
Inventory adjustment parity still needs dedicated live-write scenarios and payload assertions.
Metafield mutation parity still needs dedicated live-write scenarios and payload assertions.

Proxy request scaffold now mirrors the staged product metafield write runtime slice (`metafieldsSet(metafields:)` returning `metafields { id namespace key type value }` plus `userErrors`). Next step is to run the same safe metafield-write scenario against a dedicated dev-store write pack and compare mutation payload together with immediate downstream `product.metafield(...)` / `product.metafields` parity.

Live capture recorded for `productChangeStatus`, but the immediate downstream `product(id:)` read returned a later `updatedAt` than the mutation payload, so promotion still requires timestamp-alignment decisions.
Media mutation parity still needs dedicated live-write scenarios and payload assertions.
Media mutation parity still needs dedicated live-write scenarios and payload assertions.

Store-level Files API create parity still needs dedicated live-write scenarios and payload assertions. This differs from productCreateMedia because fileCreate creates store file assets and does not attach media to a product.
Write-path parity for staged productDuplicate still needs a dedicated safe live scenario pack and payload comparison harness.

Live safe-write capture now covers productOptionUpdate plus immediate downstream `product.options` parity, including Shopify's current behavior where renaming/repositioning the sole option still serializes it back at position `1` and only variant-backed values appear in `values`.

Live safe-write capture now covers productOptionsCreate plus immediate downstream `product.options` parity, including Shopify replacing the default Title-only state with the created option and marking the first created value as variant-backed immediately.

Live safe-write capture now covers productOptionsDelete plus immediate downstream `product.options` parity, including Shopify restoring a fresh Title/Default Title fallback option after deleting the only custom option.

Proxy request scaffold now mirrors the staged product publication runtime slice (`productPublish(input:)` returning aggregate publication fields plus `userErrors`). Next step is to run the same safe productSet scenario against a dedicated dev-store write pack and compare mutation payload plus immediate downstream product read parity.
